meaning: n.<美> 滚木头,互相吹捧,[政]资产阶级政客间互相投赞成票以通过彼此都有利的提案
examples: Logrolling can provide a solution to the so-called Paradox of voting.
Sims no longer get stuck during logrolling when trying to exit while another is entering.
The thing I like about the comments system is that everything is there for everyone to see, so they can see the machinations, the logrolling, the arguments.
